race.description: Braceys My Coranna Maiden Hurdle (GBB Race) (Div 1)
race.comment: MY BOY AARON (5) is long overdue a change of fortune having placed past three attempts. Connections appear to have found the perfect opportunity for him to get his head in front. POLEMON (6) switched stables joining Tim Vaughan having finished third delivering his last hurdle outing nearly a year ago. Market will prove the best guide towards his chances. TRAPPER JOHN (7) continues a hurdling maiden after just two starts while remains unexposed in this sphere. Warrants thought as cannot be ruled out. BOTH OF US (11) has made steady progress both starts to date and is one to watch with a view to the future.
